name: Irish Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg yolks, pecans, melted chocolate, and spices to the butter mixture.
3. Gradually add the mashed potatoes, flour, milk, and beaten egg whites to the chocolate mixture.
4. Stir in the vanilla, raisins, and baking powder.
5. Pour the batter into a greased bundt pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for nearly an hour until golden brown and firm to the touch.
